sections.paragraph:
χαίρω [Skt. assoc.]

—1. ‘be in a state marked by good feeling about an event or circumstance’, be happy/glad/delighted, rejoice Mt 2:10; 18:13; Mk 14:11; Lk 1:14; 15:32; J 3:29; Ac 5:41; Ro 12:12; 1 Cor 7:30; 2 Cor 13:9; Phil 1:18; 4:4; Col 1:24; 1 Th 3:9; 1 Pt 4:13; 2 J 4; 3 J 3; Rv 19:7.

—2. as expression of greeting tantamount to assuring the other of one’s good will, a kind of introductory social ointment, greetings Mt 26:49; 27:29; 28:9; Mk 15:18; Lk 1:28; J 19:3; 2 J 10; in elliptical use of inf. χαίρειν greetings Ac 15:23; 23:26; Js 1:1.
